com.bill.java.api.models

Class Invoice

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.bill.java.api.net.ApiResource
      • com.bill.java.api.models.Invoice

  • public class Invoice
extends com.bill.java.api.net.ApiResource
    An invoice represents products and/or services purchased by a Customer from your organization. A nested InvoiceLineItem object records products or services. Each line item can be assigned to a product/service Item along with additional Account Tracking.

    Invoices can be sent by Email or Mailed to the customer. The amount that the customer pays can be reduced with a CreditMemo (any remaining Received Payment is then recorded or charged).
